name: Miracle Rolls
recipeIngredient: 3 packages Active dry yeast (1 packet or 2 1/4 teaspoons)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water; set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, and baking soda. Cut in shortening with a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Stir in the yeast mixture and buttermilk; mix well.
4. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface; knead lightly a few times.
5. Roll to 1/2-inch thickness. Cut with a 2-1/2-inch biscuit cutter.
6. Place on lightly greased baking sheets. Cover and let rise in a warm place for about 45 minutes.
7. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
Makes: 4 dozen
Note: Can freeze rolls in freezer bags and thaw as needed.
